default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content strategy, campaign planning, and SEO progress tracking for Ambient's marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/x4tckNRRgV1TiGbpobxuCAs4jHt_tRP8?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content strategy focuses on 4 buckets: AI threat detection, industry solutions, incident intelligence, and competitive intel](https://fathom.video/share/x4tckNRRgV1TiGbpobxuCAs4jHt_tRP8?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Team to develop a comprehensive campaign approach, starting with "Beyond Gun Detection" theme](https://fathom.video/share/x4tckNRRgV1TiGbpobxuCAs4jHt_tRP8?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [Need to integrate content creation with distribution (LinkedIn, email) and SDR outreach](https://fathom.video/share/x4tckNRRgV1TiGbpobxuCAs4jHt_tRP8?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [SEO progress will be tracked via SEMrush, Looker dashboard, and Scrunch for LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/x4tckNRRgV1TiGbpobxuCAs4jHt_tRP8?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Overview

  - [4 main content buckets: AI threat detection, industry solutions, incident intelligence, competitive intel](https://fathom.video/share/x4tckNRRgV1TiGbpobxuCAs4jHt_tRP8?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Goal: Position Ambient as leader in physical security space](https://fathom.video/share/x4tckNRRgV1TiGbpobxuCAs4jHt_tRP8?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [Mix of top and bottom-funnel content, targeting both search engines and LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/x4tckNRRgV1TiGbpobxuCAs4jHt_tRP8?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Aim to publish \~5 blogs/week once in full flow](https://fathom.video/share/x4tckNRRgV1TiGbpobxuCAs4jHt_tRP8?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Campaign Approach: "Beyond Gun Detection"

  - [6-week sample campaign outlined](https://fathom.video/share/x4tckNRRgV1TiGbpobxuCAs4jHt_tRP8?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [Weekly themes: foundation problem, solution overview, case studies, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/x4tckNRRgV1TiGbpobxuCAs4jHt_tRP8?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [Need for integrated distribution strategy (social, email, SDR outreach)](https://fathom.video/share/x4tckNRRgV1TiGbpobxuCAs4jHt_tRP8?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [Team to explore ways to automate/streamline content distribution](https://fathom.video/share/x4tckNRRgV1TiGbpobxuCAs4jHt_tRP8?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)

### Content Creation and Distribution Workflow

  - [Current focus: Produce SEO-optimized content to build baseline](https://fathom.video/share/x4tckNRRgV1TiGbpobxuCAs4jHt_tRP8?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
  - [Will develop social/email distribution approach incrementally](https://fathom.video/share/x4tckNRRgV1TiGbpobxuCAs4jHt_tRP8?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [Existing AI tool can convert blog snippets to LinkedIn posts](https://fathom.video/share/x4tckNRRgV1TiGbpobxuCAs4jHt_tRP8?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)
  - [Need to develop email marketing capabilities (newsletter, SDR templates)](https://fathom.video/share/x4tckNRRgV1TiGbpobxuCAs4jHt_tRP8?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)

### Metrics and Goals

1.  Improve SEO rankings from current non-existent state
2.  Support SDRs with intent-based, personalized outbound content
3.  Group content into themed campaigns (e.g., gun detection, campus security)

### SEO Progress Tracking

  - [Using SEMrush for keyword position tracking](https://fathom.video/share/x4tckNRRgV1TiGbpobxuCAs4jHt_tRP8?tab=summary&timestamp=1668.0)
  - [Looker dashboard to visualize Google Search Console & Analytics data](https://fathom.video/share/x4tckNRRgV1TiGbpobxuCAs4jHt_tRP8?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Scrunch dashboard for LLM visibility measurement](https://fathom.video/share/x4tckNRRgV1TiGbpobxuCAs4jHt_tRP8?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)

### Content Illustrations

  - [Currently capable of creating featured hero images](https://fathom.video/share/x4tckNRRgV1TiGbpobxuCAs4jHt_tRP8?tab=summary&timestamp=1379.0)
  - [Team to explore options for in-article illustrations](https://fathom.video/share/x4tckNRRgV1TiGbpobxuCAs4jHt_tRP8?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sydney & Aida to discuss workflow integration with internal team](https://fathom.video/share/x4tckNRRgV1TiGbpobxuCAs4jHt_tRP8?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [Everest to review and approve initial blog topics in Content OS](https://fathom.video/share/x4tckNRRgV1TiGbpobxuCAs4jHt_tRP8?tab=summary&timestamp=1442.0)
  - [Team to share customer-to-industry-to-facility mapping for campaign planning](https://fathom.video/share/x4tckNRRgV1TiGbpobxuCAs4jHt_tRP8?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
  - [Set up SEO tracking tools (SEMrush, Looker, Scrunch)](https://fathom.video/share/x4tckNRRgV1TiGbpobxuCAs4jHt_tRP8?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)
  - [Develop first blog post for review next week](https://fathom.video/share/x4tckNRRgV1TiGbpobxuCAs4jHt_tRP8?tab=summary&timestamp=1760.0)
  - [Explore options for incorporating illustrations in articles](https://fathom.video/share/x4tckNRRgV1TiGbpobxuCAs4jHt_tRP8?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)

action_items.description: Discuss w/ team how to incorporate distribution (LinkedIn posts, email campaigns) into workflows. Report back to Everest
Review content OS, approve at least 1 blog post topic for next week's production
Share customer-to-industry-to-facility map with Aida and Sydney
